text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Here, Jordan! I brought some brownies for you!
Enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Thank you! Did you make these?! That's
crazy! And they're mad cute!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text: The chocolates you gave me were bussin' too! What were those?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
They were good, right?! I got them from a pop-up
at that department store, UMACO.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tickezo! Here's a chocolate for y—wait, hold
on! There's something I wanna ask you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Whew... A satisfactory time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Just like Tickezo said! Hey there, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Here, this chocolate is for the two of us getting
tighter. Basically, you're my girl from now on,
'kay?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: U-uh... Oh, aren't you Ticket's roommate?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And I've got a favor to ask! What do
you say we go running together? Basically, I'm
hoping you can give me some pointers on
improving my long distance game!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Word is you're, like, the GOAT who's come in first
in races like the Kikuka Sho and the spring Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Nearby Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that Jordan talking to Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Nearby Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No way... Can she actually follow Hayahide's uber
intellect? I bet you anything her brain is
screaming in pain right now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
By "pointers," are you referring to the theory I've
been formulating up until now?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket has told me about you. She says you're an
extremely hard worker, but... terrible at studying.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Yeah, that sounds like me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I might be a bit of an idiot, but that's why I always
wanna shoot my shot before I say anything is
impossible.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...In the past, I thought I could never do the
things that smart people can.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I decided to stop making dumb assumptions
like that, and just go for it like the idiot I am.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So will you teach me? I'll do anything! I'll work my
butt off!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! I got some chocolates for you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was doing some training on my own
earlier. Anyways, why don't you start by thanking
me for the chocolates?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm expecting triple this on White Day. You're an
adult, so you should be able to afford at least
that much.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And by the way, I don't mean triple the quantity. I mean triple the quality. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I swear. Everything revolves around training
with you. It's seriously too much—total training
maniac.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But, well... I guess that's what makes you you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Or how about this?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I want you to make sure I get three wins for each
chocolate I gave you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That can be your way of paying me back.
choice_data_list: In that case, I'll need some more chocolate.
In that case, I'll need some more chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list: Do you really think three times this is enough?
Do you really think three times this is enough?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... What are you talking about? Just how many
wins do you plan on getting me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, that's hilarious! You're so dumb!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha! Gasp... Pfhaha, ahaha... Geez...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Sorry. Hehe, okay then.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'll bring you more chocolates next time. You
better be ready.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna hold you to it, so make me into the
best idiot there is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Tosen Jordan drops by my
office with a mountain of chocolates.
